---
title: "CoVidAffect: monitoring mood variations following the COVID-19 outbreak in Spain"
date: 2020-08-18
description: "CoVidAffect monitored real-time mood variations during the Spanish nationwide COVID-19 lockdown, generating the first dataset to study affect dynamics in a lockdown situation."
categories: [News & Events, Affect dynamics]
image: assets/CoVidAffect_logo.jpg
aliases:
  - /2020/08/18/covidaffect-monitoring-mood-variations-following-the-covid-19-outbreak-in-spain/
---

<figure style="float:right; margin: 0 0 1rem 1.5rem; max-width: 182px;">
<img src="assets/CoVidAffect_logo.jpg" alt="CoVidAffect logo" style="width:100%;"/>
</figure>

CoVidAffect was a project we launched to monitor real-time mood variations during the Spanish nationwide lockdown following the COVID-19 outbreak. The program ran from March 28 to June 21, when the Spanish government lifted the state of alarm enabling social contact and unrestricted mobility. A total of 999 participants registered 17,454 mood recordings through the project website or the covidaffect Android app, developed specifically for the purposes of this study. During the study we were publishing daily updates of geo-localised mood data on the project website and maintained an open data repository where the entire dataset was available for further visualisation and analysis by any interested party.

**To our knowledge this is the first dataset that offers the opportunity to study affect dynamics in a lockdown situation**.

**More information:**

- Dataset on GitHub: <a href="https://github.com/perakakis/CoVidAffect" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener">https://github.com/perakakis/CoVidAffect</a>
- Dataset on Zenodo: <a href="https://zenodo.org/record/3774526" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener">https://zenodo.org/record/3774526</a>
- Dataset preprint: <a href="https://psyarxiv.com/3sv6r" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener">https://psyarxiv.com/3sv6r</a>
- Published paper: Bailon, C., Goicoechea, C., Banos, O., Damas, M., Pomares, H., Correa, A., Sanabria, D., Perakakis, P. (2020). <a href="https://www.nature.com/articles/s41597-020-00700-1" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener">CoVidAffect, real-time monitoring of mood variations following the COVID-19 outbreak in Spain</a>. *Scientific Data* 7, 365
- OSF project page: <a href="https://osf.io/5cqzk" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener">https://osf.io/5cqzk</a>

<div class="tableauPlaceholder" id="viz1665654209465" style="position: relative"><noscript><a href="https://covidaffect.info"><img alt="Mapa del estado de ánimo en el territorio Español" src="https://public.tableau.com/static/images/Mo/MoodvariationsduringquarantineinSpainandgendereffects/Story1/1_rss.png" style="border: none"></a></noscript><object class="tableauViz" style="display:none;"><param name="host_url" value="https%3A%2F%2Fpublic.tableau.com%2F"> <param name="embed_code_version" value="3"> <param name="site_root" value=""><param name="name" value="MoodvariationsduringquarantineinSpainandgendereffects/Story1"><param name="tabs" value="no"><param name="toolbar" value="yes"><param name="static_image" value="https://public.tableau.com/static/images/Mo/MoodvariationsduringquarantineinSpainandgendereffects/Story1/1.png"> <param name="animate_transition" value="yes"><param name="display_static_image" value="yes"><param name="display_spinner" value="yes"><param name="display_overlay" value="yes"><param name="display_count" value="yes"><param name="language" value="en-GB"></object></div><script type="text/javascript">var divElement = document.getElementById('viz1665654209465'); var vizElement = divElement.getElementsByTagName('object')[0]; vizElement.style.width='800px';vizElement.style.height='827px'; var scriptElement = document.createElement('script'); scriptElement.src = 'https://public.tableau.com/javascripts/api/viz_v1.js'; vizElement.parentNode.insertBefore(scriptElement, vizElement);</script>
